categories.name: Hot Appetizers
categories.description: Crispy and savory starters fresh from our kitchen

items.name: Samosa (2 pcs)
items.description: Crispy golden pastries stuffed with spiced potatoes and green peas, served with tamarind and mint chutneys.

items.name: Chicken Samosa (2 pcs)
items.description: Flaky pastry filled with seasoned ground chicken, herbs, and spices. Served with chutneys.

items.name: Chicken Pakora
items.description: Tender pieces of chicken marinated in spiced gram flour batter, deep fried until golden and crispy.

items.name: Vegetable Pakora
items.description: Mixed seasonal vegetables coated in seasoned gram flour batter, lightly fried to perfection.

items.name: Onion Bhaji
items.description: Crispy spiced onion fritters made with fresh onions, chickpea flour, and aromatic spices.

items.name: Chicken Tikka (Appetizer)
items.description: Boneless chicken pieces marinated in yogurt and tandoori spices, grilled in our clay oven.

items.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab
items.description: Seasoned ground lamb skewered and cooked in our traditional tandoor oven with herbs and spices.

items.name: Paneer Tikka
items.description: Chunks of fresh Indian cottage cheese marinated in tandoori spices, grilled in the clay oven.

items.name: Tandoori Shrimp
items.description: Jumbo shrimp marinated in yogurt and aromatic spices, chargrilled in our tandoor oven.

items.name: Aloo Tikki
items.description: Pan-fried spiced potato patties seasoned with cumin, coriander, and green chilies. Served with chutneys.

items.name: Chaat Papri
items.description: Crispy wafers topped with chickpeas, potatoes, yogurt, tamarind and mint chutneys.

items.name: Hara Bhara Kebab
items.description: Spinach and green pea patties with cashews and aromatic spices, lightly pan-fried.

items.name: Fish Pakora
items.description: Fresh fish fillet pieces marinated in spiced batter and deep fried until crispy and golden.

items.name: Kachumber Salad
items.description: Fresh diced cucumbers, tomatoes, and red onions tossed with lemon juice and spices.

items.name: Raita
items.description: Cool and creamy yogurt blended with fresh cucumbers, cumin, and a hint of mint.

items.name: Green Salad
items.description: Crisp mixed greens with tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions, and our house-made lemon dressing.

items.name: Papadum (2 pcs)
items.description: Thin crispy lentil wafers served with tamarind and mint chutneys.

items.name: Dal Shorba
items.description: A warming lentil soup tempered with cumin, garlic, and ghee. Comfort in a bowl.

items.name: Chicken Shorba
items.description: Aromatic chicken broth simmered with traditional Indian spices and fresh herbs.

items.name: Tomato Soup
items.description: Creamy tomato soup infused with Indian spices, finished with a touch of cream.

items.name: Mulligatawny Soup
items.description: A classic Anglo-Indian soup made with red lentils, vegetables, and aromatic curry spices.

items.name: Sweet Corn Soup
items.description: Sweet corn kernels in a mild spiced broth with a hint of black pepper and ginger.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Salad
items.description: Grilled chicken tikka strips over fresh mixed greens with tomatoes, cucumbers, and our house dressing.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Salad
items.description: Grilled paneer cubes on a bed of fresh greens with vegetables and our tangy lemon dressing.

categories.name: Dinner Entrees
categories.description: Signature dishes served with basmati rice. Choose your base sauce below.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.description: Tender chicken pieces simmered in a rich and aromatic curry sauce with onions, tomatoes, and traditional spices.

items.name: Lamb Curry
items.description: Slow-cooked tender lamb in a deeply flavored curry sauce with a blend of aromatic Indian spices.

items.name: Shrimp Curry
items.description: Fresh shrimp cooked in a fragrant curry sauce with tomatoes, onions, and a touch of coconut.

items.name: Fish Curry
items.description: Fresh fish fillet simmered in a tangy and spicy curry sauce with mustard seeds and curry leaves.

items.name: Goat Curry
items.description: Tender goat meat slow-cooked in a robust and aromatic curry sauce. A traditional favorite.

items.name: Beef Curry
items.description: Tender beef pieces cooked in a rich, deeply spiced curry sauce with onions and ginger-garlic paste.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Our most popular dish! Tender chicken in a creamy tomato-butter sauce with a hint of sweetness. Mild and flavorful.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Grilled chicken tikka pieces simmered in a creamy, spiced tomato sauce. A classic crowd-pleaser.

items.name: Vindaloo (Chicken/Lamb/Goat)
items.description: A fiery Goan-style curry with potatoes and aromatic spices. Available with chicken, lamb, or goat.

items.name: Korma (Chicken/Lamb)
items.description: A mild, creamy curry made with yogurt, nuts, and aromatic spices. Available with chicken or lamb.

items.name: Saag (Chicken/Lamb)
items.description: Tender meat simmered in a vibrant spinach-based sauce with garlic, ginger, and garam masala.

items.name: Bhuna (Chicken/Lamb)
items.description: A dry, intensely flavored curry where meat is stir-fried with caramelized onions and bold spices.

items.name: Rogan Josh (Lamb)
items.description: A Kashmiri specialty featuring tender lamb in a rich, aromatic sauce with whole spices and saffron.

items.name: Madras Curry (Chicken/Lamb)
items.description: A bold and spicy South Indian-style curry with coconut and a blend of roasted spices.

items.name: Tikka Masala Sauce (Paneer/Vegetable)
items.description: Our popular tikka masala sauce available with paneer or mixed vegetables.

categories.name: Indo Chinese
categories.description: A flavorful fusion of Indian and Chinese cuisines

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Stir-fried chicken with bell peppers, onions, and green chilies in a tangy Indo-Chinese sauce.

items.name: Vegetable Chilli
items.description: A medley of crisp vegetables stir-fried with soy sauce, vinegar, and Indo-Chinese spices.

items.name: Saag Paneer
items.description: Fresh cottage cheese cubes in a creamy, aromatic spinach sauce with garlic and ginger.

items.description: Soft paneer cubes swimming in a velvety pureed spinach gravy with warming spices.

items.name: Dal Tadka
items.description: Yellow lentils tempered with ghee, cumin, mustard seeds, garlic, and dried red chilies.

items.name: Dal Makhani

items.name: Aloo Gobi
items.description: Cauliflower and potatoes stir-fried with turmeric, cumin, and aromatic spices.

items.name: Aloo Matar
items.description: Potatoes and green peas in a lightly spiced tomato-based sauce with ginger and cumin.

items.name: Malai Kofta
items.description: Deep-fried paneer and potato dumplings in a rich, creamy cashew and tomato sauce.

items.name: Matar Paneer
items.description: Fresh paneer cubes and green peas in a mild, creamy tomato gravy with warming spices.

items.name: Bhindi Masala
items.description: Fresh okra slices stir-fried with onions, tomatoes, and a blend of traditional spices.

items.name: Baingan Bharta
items.description: Roasted and mashed eggplant cooked with onions, tomatoes, and aromatic spices. Smoky and savory.

items.name: Shahi Paneer
items.description: Paneer cubes in a luxurious creamy cashew and almond sauce with a touch of saffron.

items.name: Paneer Do Pyaza
items.description: Paneer cubes cooked with a generous amount of onions in a rich, spiced gravy.

items.name: Mixed Vegetable Curry
items.description: A colorful medley of seasonal vegetables in a mild, aromatic curry sauce.

items.name: Kadai Paneer
items.description: Paneer stir-fried with bell peppers and onions in a bold kadai masala sauce.

items.name: Navratan Korma
items.description: Nine-gem curry with vegetables, fruits, nuts, and paneer in a mild creamy sauce.

items.name: Vegetable Vindaloo
items.description: A fiery and tangy curry with mixed vegetables, potatoes, and vindaloo spices.

items.name: Tofu Masala
items.description: Crispy pan-fried tofu cubes in a rich, aromatic tomato-based masala sauce.

items.name: Steamed Basmati Rice
items.description: Fluffy, long-grain basmati rice steamed to perfection. The perfect companion to any curry.

items.name: Jeera Rice
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice tempered with cumin seeds and a touch of ghee.

items.name: Chicken Biryani
items.description: Layers of aromatic basmati rice and marinated chicken slow-cooked with saffron, whole spices, and fried onions.

items.name: Lamb Biryani
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with tender lamb, saffron, and a blend of whole spices. Slow-cooked to perfection.

items.name: Vegetable Biryani
items.description: Aromatic rice layered with mixed vegetables, saffron, and whole spices. A vegetarian delight.

items.name: Shrimp Biryani
items.description: Aromatic basmati rice layered with jumbo shrimp, saffron, and traditional spices.

categories.name: Tandoori Specials
categories.description: Dishes cooked in our traditional clay oven

items.name: Tandoori Chicken (Half)
items.description: Half chicken marinated overnight in yogurt and tandoori spices, chargrilled in our clay oven. Sizzling and smoky.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken (Whole)
items.description: A whole chicken marinated in aromatic spices and grilled in the tandoor. Perfect for sharing.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.description: Boneless chicken chunks marinated in yogurt, lemon, and tandoori spices, grilled on skewers.

items.name: Lamb Boti Kebab
items.description: Tender cubes of lamb marinated in spices and grilled in the tandoor until perfectly charred.

items.name: Lamb Chops
items.description: Herb-marinated lamb chops grilled in the tandoor oven. Juicy and full of flavor.

items.name: Tandoori Shrimp
items.description: Jumbo shrimp marinated in spiced yogurt and grilled in the clay oven. Succulent and aromatic.

items.name: Tandoori Fish
items.description: Fresh fish fillet marinated in tandoori spices and grilled in the clay oven. Flaky and flavorful.

items.name: Tandoori Mixed Grill
items.description: A grand platter of chicken tikka, lamb kebab, seekh kebab, and tandoori shrimp. Perfect for two.

items.name: Cafe of India Special Curry
items.description: Our signature dish! A unique blend of chicken, vegetables, and aromatic spices in a special sauce created by our head chef.

items.description: Paneer cubes in a rich, creamy tomato and cashew sauce with a hint of fenugreek.

items.description: Tender chicken simmered in a vibrant, aromatic spinach sauce with garlic and warming spices.

items.name: Mango Curry
items.description: A sweet and savory curry made with ripe mangoes, cream, and mild spices. Available with chicken or vegetables.
